_meta.note: Brand-level reliability data. Only values we could independently verify from 2026 primary sources are populated; unverified fields are null. service_rate_overall = first-year service call rate from Yale Appliance's Dec 2025 / 2026 report (33,190 calls, Greater Boston / Cape Cod / Southern NH). cr_best_brand_2026 = categories in which Consumer Reports named the brand 'Best' in its Feb 2026 press release. Lower service rate = better.

brands.name: LG
brands.notes: Yale 2026: 5.5% service rate — front-load washers and wall ovens lead; linear compressors fail ~1.1% within 5 years (Yale). CR 2026 best brand: gas cooktop, electric cooktop, top-freezer fridge, and wall oven. Builds its own components.

brands.name: LG Studio
brands.notes: Yale 2026: 8.2% service rate. Upscale LG line with upgraded wall ovens, dishwashers, and speed-over-steam-assist ovens. Differentiation vs LG and SKS is not always clear-cut.

brands.name: Miele
brands.notes: Yale 2026: 7.4% overall; dishwasher service rate improved from 10% to 5.5% year-over-year. Tested to 20 years of use. 15–20% price increases announced for 2026. Limited US fridge lineup (mostly integrated).

brands.name: Bosch
brands.notes: Yale 2026: 8.7% service rate — dishwashers are the core strength. CR 2026 best brand for dishwashers and French-door fridges. Expanding 100 Series entry tier. Cooktops manufactured in Spain (shared with Gaggenau / Thermador).

brands.name: Bosch Benchmark
brands.notes: Yale 2026: 7.8% service rate. Bosch's flagship line — dishwashers and induction cooktops. Premium pricing with modest feature upgrades over 800 Series.

brands.name: Gaggenau
brands.notes: Yale 2026: 7.7% service rate. BSH-owned (same parent as Bosch, Thermador). Strongest in wall ovens and induction cooktops — cooktops service-free for the first two years per Yale.

brands.name: GE Profile
brands.notes: Yale 2026: 8.0% service rate. Mid-premium positioning with significant overlap with the Café line. New 5.3 cu ft washer launched 2026.

brands.name: GE Appliances
brands.notes: Yale 2026: 9.2% service rate — 'one of the best values' per Yale. CR 2026 best brand for gas ranges and side-by-side fridges. Operates its own national service network.

brands.name: Café Appliances
brands.notes: GE's design-forward line — customizable hardware, matte finishes, Wi-Fi standard. Not in Yale 2026 top-11 reliability list; service rate not independently verified for 2026.

brands.name: Monogram
brands.notes: GE's luxury / built-in line, positioned against Sub-Zero and Wolf. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Signature Kitchen Suite (SKS)
brands.notes: Yale 2026: 8.8% service rate. LG's ultra-premium line with pro-style ranges and induction with Sous Vide. New 7,000W induction element boils a gallon in under 3.5 min. Thinly distributed outside metro markets.

brands.name: Whirlpool
brands.notes: Workhorse reputation, simple designs, strong parts availability. Not listed in Yale 2026 top-11; Yale notes it doesn't always carry Whirlpool, so no Yale rate. No independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Maytag
brands.notes: Whirlpool sub-brand with heavy-duty marketing. Shares parts with Whirlpool. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: KitchenAid
brands.notes: Whirlpool's premium kitchen brand — shares reliability DNA with Whirlpool at higher price. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Samsung
brands.notes: Leader in smart features (Bespoke, Family Hub, Flex Duo). Historically critiqued for US repair network depth, especially for ice makers. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Frigidaire
brands.notes: Budget mainstream — Gallery line is the mid-tier. CR 2026 best brand for electric ranges. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Electrolux
brands.notes: Swedish parent of Frigidaire. Strong counter-depth refrigerator lineup. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Fisher & Paykel
brands.notes: Niche, innovative (DishDrawer double-drawer DW). Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Sub-Zero
brands.notes: Built-in refrigeration specialist — dual compressors, $10k+ entry, designed for 20+ year service life. Not in Yale 2026 top-11 (Yale sells Sub-Zero but didn't publish a 2026 rate in its top-11 report); no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Wolf
brands.notes: Sister brand to Sub-Zero — pro-style ranges, cooktops, wall ovens. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Thermador
brands.notes: BSH-owned (same parent as Bosch, Gaggenau). Freedom Collection for coordinated built-ins. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: JennAir
brands.notes: Whirlpool's luxury line — Rise (stainless) and Noir (black) aesthetics. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Viking
brands.notes: Pro-style ranges, colors. Reliability history is polarizing. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: BlueStar
brands.notes: Commercial-grade open-burner pro ranges, hand-built USA. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Beko
brands.notes: European budget brand expanding in the US — energy-efficient, basic features. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Hisense
brands.notes: Value tier, expanding US lineup. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Haier
brands.notes: Parent company of GE Appliances. Compact / apartment units dominate the US Haier-branded lineup. Not in Yale 2026 top-11 under the Haier name; no independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: ZLINE
brands.notes: Pro-style on a budget, Autograph Edition hardware. Newer brand with fast-growing lineup; long-term reliability track record still short. No independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Forno
brands.notes: Italian-styled ranges and refrigerators, newer US importer. No independently verified 2026 service rate.

brands.name: Hotpoint
brands.notes: GE Appliances sub-brand — stripped-down top-freezers and basic ranges. Reviewed.com picked Hotpoint HPS16BTNRWW as best 2026 top-freezer. Not in Yale 2026 top-11; no independently verified 2026 service rate.
